name: blackcrow
description: BlackCrow escrow MVP frontend and lightweight backend API.

scripts.build: node -e "console.log('BlackCrow uses static frontend assets; no build step required.')"
scripts.check: node --check backend/server.js && node --check backend/email.js && node --check backend/payments.js && node --check backend/migrate.js && node --check backend/smoke-test.js && node --check backend/storage/fileStore.js && node --check backend/storage/postgresStore.js && node --check backend/storage/index.js && node --check script.js
